# Security Policy

## Scope

This is a public conversation-prep repository. It contains no production systems, credentials, or live customer data.

## What Should Never Be Committed

- Credentials, tokens, API keys, or passwords of any kind
- Customer or prospect names, company names, or identifying details
- Internal pricing, deal terms, or confidential strategy
- Private keys or session cookies

If any of the above is committed by mistake, open an issue immediately so it can be removed from history.

## Supported Versions

Only the latest commit on `main` is maintained.

## Reporting a Vulnerability

Open a public GitHub issue for general security concerns. If you believe disclosure would cause active harm, contact the maintainer directly.
